description: As a cardiology practitioner, complete the outpatient secondary prevention protocol in GNU Health for Roberto Carlos, a 68-year-old male recently discharged after an Acute Myocardial Infarction (NSTEMI). The protocol requires documenting a cardiac diagnosis (I21 or I25), prescribing a multi-drug secondary prevention regimen (at least two of: aspirin, statin, beta-blocker), ordering baseline lipid monitoring laboratory tests, documenting lifestyle counseling (smoking cessation or cardiac diet), and scheduling a cardiology follow-up appointment in 21 to 35 days. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
